name: Iron Man
abilities: Repulsor Blast: Deal 3 damage to any target.
Armor Up: Gain 2 shields until your next turn.

name: Thanos
abilities: Infinity Gauntlet: At the start of your turn, collect one Infinity Stone token.
Snap: When you have 6 Infinity Stone tokens, eliminate all non-Titan characters.
flavorText: Perfectly balanced, as all things should be.

name: Wakanda
abilities: Vibranium Vault: Heroes deployed here gain +1 power.
Wakanda Forever: Once per game, prevent all damage to characters here for one turn.

name: Spider-Man
abilities: Web Shot: Stun target character for one turn.
Spider-Sense: Cannot be targeted by events on the opponent's turn.
flavorText: With great power comes great responsibility.

name: Mjolnir
abilities: Worthy: Only a hero with Power 7 or greater can equip Mjolnir.
Lightning Strike: The equipped hero deals +2 damage and gains Flying.
